task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Facilities management page within OpenEMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenEMR interface with 'Facilities' in the header, breadcrumbs, or the Administration/Practice Settings menu expanded to show Facilities.

task_completion.description: The facility name was entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Add Facility' or 'Edit Facility' form showing 'Riverside Family Medicine - East' in the Name field.

task_completion.description: The full address details (Street, City, State, Zip, Country) were entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing '450 Harbor View Drive, Suite 200', 'Springfield', 'Massachusetts' (or MA), '01109', and 'USA' in the address fields.

task_completion.description: Contact information (Phone, Fax) and Identification numbers (Tax ID, NPI) were entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing Phone '(413) 555-0192', Fax '(413) 555-0193', Federal Tax ID '04-3892156', and Facility NPI '1234567893' in their respective fields.

task_completion.description: The Service Location and Billing Location options were explicitly enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the checkboxes for 'Service Location' and 'Billing Location' checked/ticked.

task_completion.description: The new facility was saved and appears in the facility list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the main Facilities list containing 'Riverside Family Medicine - East', or a success message confirming the record was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenEMR web interface to add the facility, not backend database commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser displaying OpenEMR forms and lists, not a terminal or SQL console.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the specific OpenEMR fields rather than pasting a text block into a generic editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual context must be the OpenEMR 'Add Facility' form, not a notepad or unrelated text field.

integrity.description: The interaction appears to be with a live instance of OpenEMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard OpenEMR UI elements (headers, sidebars, buttons) are visible and consistent with the application style.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Facility Name: Riverside Family Medicine - East. Address: 450 Harbor View Drive, Suite 200, Springfield, MA 01109, USA. Phone: (413) 555-0192. Fax: (413) 555-0193. Federal Tax ID: 04-3892156. Facility NPI: 1234567893. Service Location: Yes. Billing Location: Yes.
